meaning: 纳贾夫[伊拉克中南部城市](伊斯兰教什叶派圣地)
examples: The US forces resumed attacking Iraqi defenses near An-Najaf.
A senior police official in Najaf said several of his men were missing.
In the south, Shiite rebels controlled major cities such as Karbala, Najaf, and Basra.
The transfer is considered the most significant so far because of Najaf's religious importance.
